task.summary: Default task
pre offset switch
offset switch complete, pre surrounding cells mapping
checkbox controls implemented
templates added
pre cell count implementation
pre automata2 fix
pre general clean up of styling
post general cleanup
post general cleanup 2 and speed corrections
pre refactor of the play-pause-step buttons
name change and cleanup
name change and cleanup 2
lots of css cleanup
pre switch to more precise drawing
pre growthType refactor
moved growth_types out of constant and into menu directive
moved some constants
basically logging implemented
implemented zeroclipboard to copy the log out of the app
mouse toggle versus tick toggle log implemented
grid now properly resizes
some variable renaming prior to timer refactor
now only redraws when needed instead of on constant timer
general cleanup of board directive
moved log type constant to board directive
log cell position implemented but not changeable from 1-1
log cell position and color are now adjustable
get log now exports as a csv but still needs better formatting of content
log now adjusts to log XY position
logging moved to a seperate service
changes to slider that it can increase and decrease the sliderValue
adjusted timer so it no longer needs to calculate the speed
general cleanup of some un-needed things
removed borders option
getLog button style updated

MESSAGE.value: name change and cleanup

lots of css cleanup
pre switch to more precise drawing

moved growth_types out of constant and into menu directive
moved some constants
basically logging implemented
implemented zeroclipboard to copy the log out of the app

grid now properly resizes
some variable renaming prior to timer refactor
now only redraws when needed instead of on constant timer
general cleanup of board directive
moved log type constant to board directive
log cell position implemented but not changeable from 1-1
log cell position and color are now adjustable
get log now exports as a csv but still needs better formatting of content
log now adjusts to log XY position
logging moved to a seperate service
changes to slider that it can increase and decrease the sliderValue
adjusted timer so it no longer needs to calculate the speed
general cleanup of some un-needed things
removed borders option
getLog button style updated
